title: Hot Wheels Legends Tour
summary: 200px|rightThe Hot Wheels Legends Tour is an annual custom car competition organized by Mattel since 2018 across the United States and globally, initially started to celebrate Hot Wheels's 50th anniversary. A calendar of scheduled events is released before the start of the competition, with global events introduced in 2020; US-based events have usually been held in conjunction with Wal-Mart....

title: Vintage Series
summary:
center|750px
Vintage Series was a special set of cars that were issued after the popular 25th Anniversary cars. Appearing in 1993 to 1994 they were reissued copies of some of the Original 16 cars and other early Hot Wheels castings. Just like the Original 16, each car came with many colorful variations, but in metallic paint, not Spectraflame.

title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 24 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: Radical Rides
summary: Radical Rides is a line of cartoonish Bobble Head cars spanning from 1999 to 2001. The line focused on two sports; NASCAR & the NBA. The cars are 1:43 scale with a cartoonish look.
